description: Build a centralized config.yaml configuration mechanism to control agent parameters without hardcoding.

userStories.title: Create centralized config.yaml and default settings
userStories.description: As a JobStream operator, I want a centralized config.yaml file so that I can manage agent parameters without changing code.
acceptanceCriteria: Given the JobStream agent is deployed
When the operator looks for configuration options
Then they find config/config.yaml with llm and path settings

tasks.description: Create the config directory if it does not exist
Create config/config.yaml with default schema for llm and paths as defined in the TRD

userStories.title: Parse and inject config.yaml in load_config_and_resume
userStories.description: As a JobStream operator, I want the agent to automatically load config.yaml into its state when it starts so that all subsequent nodes can access the configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Given config/config.yaml exists and is valid
When the parent graph starts and runs load_config_and_resume
Then the parsed YAML content is returned under the 'config' state key

tasks.description: Add logic in load_config_and_resume to read and parse config/config.yaml
Update the return dictionary to pass the parsed config into the 'config' state key
Add error handling to fallback to an empty dict if the file is missing or invalid
